name: alarm-correlation-engine
description: Correlate Huawei Cloud AOM active and historical alarms for CCE operations.

tools.name: huawei_list_aom_alarms
tools.description: Run huawei_list_aom_alarms through the shared Huawei Cloud dispatcher.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.

enterprise_project_id.description: Optional enterprise project scope. Use all_granted_eps to match Console-wide rule count.

tools.name: huawei_list_aom_current_alarms
tools.description: Run huawei_list_aom_current_alarms through the shared Huawei Cloud dispatcher.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.

enterprise_project_id.description: Enterprise project scope. Use all_granted_eps to query all granted enterprise projects.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.

tools.name: huawei_list_aom_alarm_rules
tools.description: Run huawei_list_aom_alarm_rules through the shared Huawei Cloud dispatcher.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.

tools.name: huawei_create_aom_alarm_rule
tools.description: Run huawei_create_aom_alarm_rule through the shared Huawei Cloud dispatcher.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

fields.description: Optional JSON object with extra create fields, for example {"unit":"%","is_turn_on":true}.

confirm.description: Must be true only after explicit user confirmation.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.

tools.name: huawei_create_aom_event_alarm_rule
tools.description: Create an AOM event alarm rule. Supports bind_notification_rule_id and requires confirm=true to execute.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

enterprise_project_id.description: Optional enterprise project scope. Defaults to all_granted_eps when omitted.

event_name.description: Event name. Supports full display format like 节点磁盘空间不足##NodeHasDiskPressure.

event_label.description: Optional display label when event_name is event code only.

bind_notification_rule_id.description: Optional notification rule id/name. Example: auto-cluster-<cluster_id>.

alarm_level.description: Alarm severity key, for example Critical, Major, Minor, Info. Default Major.

confirm.description: Must be true only after explicit user confirmation.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.

tools.name: huawei_update_aom_alarm_rule
tools.description: Run huawei_update_aom_alarm_rule through the shared Huawei Cloud dispatcher.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

updates.description: JSON object with fields to update, for example {"threshold":"80","is_turn_on":true}.

confirm.description: Must be true only after explicit user confirmation.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.

tools.description: Run huawei_delete_aom_alarm_rule through the shared Huawei Cloud dispatcher.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

confirm.description: Must be true only after explicit user confirmation.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.

tools.name: huawei_disable_aom_alarm_rule
tools.description: Disable an AOM alarm rule by rule_id. Requires confirm=true to execute.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

rule_id.description: AOM alarm rule ID to disable.

confirm.description: Must be true only after explicit user confirmation.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.

tools.name: huawei_enable_aom_alarm_rule
tools.description: Enable an AOM alarm rule by rule_id. Requires confirm=true to execute.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

rule_id.description: AOM alarm rule ID to enable.

confirm.description: Must be true only after explicit user confirmation.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.
